case_title: ZHUO CHEN VS. TIMOTHY LEE WARREN JR

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-12-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, ZHUO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARREN JR, TIMOTHY LEE $1,787.60 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,827.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN JR, TIMOTHY LEE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CHEN, ZHUO
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN JR, TIMOTHY LEE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,787.60 FILED BY CHEN, ZHUO AS TO DEFENDANT WARREN JR, TIMOTHY LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF ZHUO CHEN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, ZHUO

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEN, ZHUO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
